name: golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev
title: golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev
summary: fast Go library for detecting MIME types and extensions based on magic numbers
description:
fast Go library for detecting MIME types and extensions based on magic numbers
github.com/gabriel-vasile/mimetype is a Go package for detecting MIME types
and extensions based on magic numbers.
.
Goroutine safe, extensible, no C bindings
.
Features
• fast and precise MIME type and file extension detection
• long list of supported MIME types
• posibility to extend with other file formats
• common file formats are prioritized
• safe for concurrent usage
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev because fast Go library for detecting MIME types and extensions based on magic numbers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-gabriel-vasile-mimetype-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
